title: TC001-Create a new artifact with all required trilingual fields and publish status
description: Verifies an admin can create a new artifact and see it listed in the artifacts table.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:4173/admin
        await page.goto("http://localhost:4173/admin", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Type the admin username into the email field (index 22) and then type the password into the password field (index 23), then submit the login form (click index 26).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('k.alexi@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/div[2]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('11223344')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Arşiv Eserleri' (Artifacts) sidebar button to open the artifacts list (index 276).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/aside/nav/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Yeni Eser Ekle' button to open the create artifact form (click element index 536).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Admin').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Yeni Eser Ekle').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Kaydet').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=E2E Test Eser TR').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Yayınla').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
TEST FAILURE

ASSERTIONS:
- Image URL input field not found on the 'Yeni Eser' create artifact form; there is no visible text input to paste an external image URL.
- Only a file upload control (input type=file, index 1459) is present on the form, which prevents setting an external image URL as required by the test specification.
- Artifact creation cannot be completed according to the provided test steps because the required image-URL entry feature is missing.

title: TC002-Create artifact validation: missing image URL shows required-field error
description: Verifies required-field validation blocks saving when image URL is missing.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow

        # -> Input the admin email into the E-POSTA field (index 21).

        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('k.alexi@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/div[2]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('11223344')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Arşiv Eserleri' (Artifacts) sidebar button to open the archive artifacts module (index 277).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/aside/nav/button[3]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Arşiv Eserleri' (Artifacts) sidebar button to open the archive artifacts module (use interactive element index 276). ASSERTION: After clicking, the artifacts page should load and interactive elements for adding a new artifact should be available.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/aside/nav/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Yeni Eser Ekle' button to open the add-artifact form so the required-field validation can be tested (use element index 724).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Open the Kategori dropdown so a valid category can be selected (click element index 1618). After that: select a category option, fill the Turkish title, click Kaydet, and verify validation messages for missing image.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div/div/select').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Select category 'Fotoğraflar & Objeler', fill Başlık (TR) with 'E2E Missing Image TR', and click 'Eseri Kaydet' to trigger the missing-image validation.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[4]/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('E2E Missing Image TR')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[5]/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Could not extract page content; cannot perform the required assertions for texts 'Admin', 'Görsel', 'zorunlu'.
        raise AssertionError('Could not extract page content; available elements list missing. Cannot verify texts: "Admin", "Görsel", "zorunlu". Marking task as done.')
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

title: TC003-Create artifact validation: missing Turkish title shows required-field error

code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:4173/admin
        await page.goto("http://localhost:4173/admin", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Perform login using provided credentials to reach the admin dashboard (fill email index 21, password index 22, click submit index 25), then wait for the dashboard to load.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('k.alexi@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/div[2]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('11223344')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Yeni Eser Ekle' quick-action button to open the new artifact form (button index 447).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[3]/div/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Open the artifact creation form by clicking '+ Yeni Eser Ekle' (button index 536).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Eseri Kaydet' submit button (index 1480) to attempt saving without the Turkish title, then check the page for validation messages containing 'Başlık' and 'zorunlu'.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[5]/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[4]/div[1]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        assert await elem.is_visible(), "Title (TR) input should be visible"
        save_btn = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[5]/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        assert await save_btn.is_visible(), "Save button should still be visible after failed submit"
        assert "/admin" in frame.url, f"Expected to remain on admin page after validation error, but URL is {frame.url}"
        raise AssertionError("Validation messages 'Başlık' and 'zorunlu' were not found in the available page elements; feature may be missing or validation messages are not rendered.")
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('k.alexi@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]

        frame = context.pages[-1]

    finally:

            await context.close()

            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)

        # --> Assertions to verify final state

        await expect(frame.locator('text=zorunlu').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)

    finally:

        if pw:

asyncio.run(run_test())

import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():

title: TC010-Date validation: leave event date empty and verify validation error shown
description: Verifies saving an event without an event date shows a visible date validation error and the record is not saved.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:4173/admin
        await page.goto("http://localhost:4173/admin", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Fill email (index 21) and password (index 22) and click the login button (index 25).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('k.alexi@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/div[2]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('11223344')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Etkinlik' module tile to open the Events module (index 377).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/div[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Yeni Etkinlik Ekle' (New Event) button to open the event creation form (index 536).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Fill the Turkish title with 'Başlıksız Tarih Testi' then click 'Etkinliği Kaydet' to trigger validation; after the click, check for a visible date validation error and confirm the record was not saved.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[5]/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Başlıksız Tarih Testi')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[6]/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        date_locator = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[1]/div[1]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        # Check HTML5 validity for the date input; if the form uses native validation this will be false when missing/invalid
        is_valid = await date_locator.evaluate('el => el.checkValidity()')
        if is_valid:
            raise AssertionError('Expected the event date input to be invalid after submitting without a date. No validation was triggered; the date validation feature may be missing.')
        # Check for a browser-provided validation message (non-empty string)
        validation_message = await date_locator.evaluate('el => el.validationMessage')
        if not validation_message:
            raise AssertionError('Expected a visible validation message for the event date, but none was found. The validation feature may be missing.')
        # Confirm the title value is still present in the form (record not saved/cleared)
        title_val = await frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[5]/div[1]/input').input_value()
        assert title_val == 'Başlıksız Tarih Testi', f"Expected title to remain in the form after failed save, but found: '{title_val}'"
        # Confirm we remain on the admin area (record not redirected to a saved/list page)
        assert "/admin" in frame.url
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode

            headless=True,

                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow

        await page.goto("http://localhost:4173/admin", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Type the admin email into the email input (index 6).

        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('k.alexi@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/div[2]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('11223344')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Etkinlikler' (Events) module link to open the events admin page (click element index 63).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/nav/div/div[2]/div/a[4]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Yeni Etkinlik Ekle' quick action button (index 884) to open the event creation form.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[3]/div/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Yeni Etkinlik Ekle' button (index 973) to open the event creation form so the date input and 'Kaydet' button become visible for validation testing.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Fill the event date input (index 1172) with the invalid format '15/01/2025' and click the 'Etkinliği Kaydet' button (index 1223) to trigger validation and observe any visible date error.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('15/01/2025')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[6]/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        date_input = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[1]/div[1]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        assert await date_input.count() == 1, 'Event date input not found on the page'
        is_valid = await date_input.evaluate('el => el.checkValidity()')
        if is_valid:
            raise AssertionError("Expected the event date '15/01/2025' to be invalid, but the date input is considered valid by the browser. No visible validation error found.")
        else:
            # The browser reports the input as invalid, but there is no visible validation message element in the provided page elements list to assert against.
            raise AssertionError('Date input is invalid according to browser validity, but no visible date validation error element exists on the page (feature missing).')
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

        # -> Click the 'Mekan' (Venue) module link in the admin dashboard so the venues list appears (click element index 381).

        # Click element

        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Düzenle' (Edit) button for the first venue in the list (index 552).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/table/tbody/tr/td[7]/div/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Type 'Yeni özellik' into the features_tr input (index 859) and then click 'Ekle' (index 860), then click 'Alanı Kaydet' (index 868) to save.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[10]/div[3]/div[2]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Yeni özellik')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[10]/div[3]/div[2]/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)

        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # -> Final assertions after adding a new feature and saving
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        
        # Assert we're still in the admin area
        assert "/admin" in frame.url
        
        # Sidebar 'Mekan Kiralama' button should be visible
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/main/div/aside/nav/button[4]').nth(0)
        assert await elem.is_visible()
        
        # The venue title input should contain the expected venue title (indicates we were on the edit page)

        title_val = await title_input.input_value()
        assert title_val == "Test Mekan TR"
        
        # The feature input should be present (where we typed the new feature)

        assert await add_btn.is_visible()
        
        # The 'Alanı Kaydet' (Save) button should be present
        save_btn = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[11]/button[2]').nth(0)
        assert await save_btn.is_visible()
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:4173/admin
        await page.goto("http://localhost:4173/admin", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Fill the admin email and password fields and click the 'Giriş Yap' (login) button to access the admin dashboard.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('k.alexi@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/div[2]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('11223344')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Tarihçe' tab in the admin sidebar to open the History module.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/aside/nav/button[5]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        await expect(frame.locator('text=1999').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Test Tarihçe Kaydı TR').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:4173/admin
        await page.goto("http://localhost:4173/admin", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Click the 'History' tab in the admin sidebar (the next page should show History entries and an option to add a new record).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('k.alexi@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/div[2]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('11223344')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/div/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Tarihçe' tab in the admin sidebar to open the History module (index 281).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/aside/nav/button[5]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Yeni Olay Ekle' / 'Yeni Tarihçe Kaydı Ekle' button to open the create form (index 538).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Clear the Year input, fill Başlık (TR) with 'Yıl alanı boş', then submit the form to trigger validation.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[3]/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Yıl alanı boş')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[4]/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Assert the Year input ("Yıl") is present and visible
        year_input = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/main/div/main/div/div/div[2]/form/div[1]/div[1]/input')
        assert await year_input.is_visible(), "Expected the 'Yıl' (year) input to be visible on the form"
        
        # The test plan requires verifying a validation message containing the text 'zorunlu'.
        # There is no element with the text 'zorunlu' in the provided available elements list, so we cannot assert its visibility using the exact xpaths.
        raise AssertionError("Validation message with text 'zorunlu' was not found among the available elements; cannot assert required-field validation for 'Yıl'.")
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
